'''Harazod''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]]<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|17|Harazod"}}</ref> of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Gerrard V]]. In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], it was [[Uprising on Gerrard V|seized]] by [[Gerrard V Rebels|local rebels]] commanded by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Camon Udeon]]. An [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Task force/Legends|task force]] under the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Jion Trynn]] forced the rebels to retreat to the [[capitol building]], where they offered terms of surrender. Udeon refused, and Trynn authorized the orbital bombardment of Harazod's urban center.<ref name="GNN3" />
